data.description: In test_ticket_create_without_flock, the PATH filter uses grep -v 'util-linux|flock' which only removes path components whose directory name contains 'flock' or 'util-linux'. On systems where flock lives in /usr/bin, the filter silently fails and the test runs with real flock in PATH. A more reliable fix is to strip by binary name or construct a minimal PATH from safe directories.
data.title: test-flock-busybox-compat: PATH-stripping filter may not remove flock on systems where it lives in a non-flock-named directory
